name: @broberg/event-log
description: Headless append-only event-log core (audit / activity / server layers): typed LogEntry with a generic kind, a frozen LogStore interface, fire-and-forget writers that never throw, convenience wrappers (logLogin, logDocumentCreated, …), plus GDPR primitives — filterEntries, anonymizeContact, and a Web-Crypto SHA-256 hashIp. Zero deps, no framework/DB imports; JSONL/SQLite/Supabase adapters build on top.
